message:
🐛 fix: use correct label_sync image from gcr.io

The label_sync image doesn't exist in us-docker.pkg.dev/k8s-infra-prow/images/
registry. Using the latest available version from gcr.io/k8s-prow/ instead.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@ periodics:
       clone_uri: "https://github.com/kubestellar/infra.git"
     spec:
       containers:
-      - image: us-docker.pkg.dev/k8s-infra-prow/images/label_sync:v20260109-e821f0db6
+      - image: gcr.io/k8s-prow/label_sync:v20240731-a5d9345e59
         command:
         - /bin/sh
         - -c
